judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but currently loss-making, with high valuation multiples and significant analyst growth expectations.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimate; next earnings date 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 51.4% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 441.7% — substantial future growth anticipated.
Forward P/E 34.63 and PEG ratio 0.78 — suggests growth may justify valuation.
Total cash $439.70M vs Total debt $280.42M — manageable leverage.
Consensus 'buy' with a mean target of $151.30.
negatives: Operating margin -8.6% and Profit margin -8.5% — currently unprofitable.
Return on equity -6.1% and Return on assets -3.3% — negative returns.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-445.58M — significant cash burn.
Price/Sales (TTM) 26.16 — high valuation relative to current sales.
Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 44.8%.

news.paragraph: AAOI was mentioned in headlines alongside other AI leaders that saw a sell-off, despite a general market rally. Separately, Mark Cuban urged a focus on foundational AI, a theme relevant to AAOI's business. The stock's recent price action and commentary suggest investor sentiment may be shifting, with potential implications for upcoming earnings.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Iran Delay Saves Dow, But Sandisk, Bloom Energy, AI Leaders Sell Off
Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (AAOI): Mark Cuban Urges Focus on Foundational AI
Ambiq Micro (AMBQ) Reports Q1 2026 GAAP Net Sales of $25.1M

examples.body: $AAOI and $LITE more pain coming. Continue to walk down. Be short
